sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: LIAM Stock Fund Price and Chart — CBOE:LIAM
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the LIAM (LifeX 2055 Inflation-Protected Longevity Income ETF) stock fund, including its price, chart, key statistics like AUM and dividend yield, and investment strategy. It covers the fund's aim to provide predictable cashflows through 2055 by investing in US Treasury securities, mainly TIPS, and explains its unique distribution options and inflation adjustments. The article also includes technical analysis, seasonal trends, and a comprehensive FAQ section addressing common queries about ETFs, LIAM's performance, and investment details.

feed.title: Lipocine Files Prospectus to Enable $50M Stock Offering
feed.summary: Lipocine Inc. has filed a prospectus to enable a stock offering of up to $50 million. This follows a sales agreement made in April 2024 with A.G.P./Alliance Global Partners to periodically sell common stock. The move provides Lipocine with a mechanism to raise additional equity capital to support its corporate and operational needs.

feed.title: New Ryzen Series Chips Add to Advanced Micro Devices' (AMD) Bull Thesis
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) has unveiled its new Ryzen AI 400 Series and Ryzen AI PRO 400 Series chips, designed to power on-device AI acceleration for high-performance laptops and PCs. This move strengthens AMD's position in the AI semiconductor market. Additionally, AMD is supporting a $300 million loan for data center company Crusoe, which will use AMD's AI accelerators in an Ohio data center, further showcasing AMD's commitment to expanding its AI infrastructure presence.

feed.title: LKQ (LKQ) HR SVP has 1,767 shares withheld to cover RSU taxes
feed.summary: LKQ Corp's Senior Vice President of Human Resources, Genevieve L. Dombrowski, had 1,767.42 shares of common stock withheld by the company to cover tax obligations arising from the vesting of restricted stock units. This transaction, valued at $32.50 per share, was a non-open-market disposition for tax withholding purposes, not a discretionary sale by the insider. After this event, Dombrowski directly owns 47,657.6060 shares of LKQ common stock.

feed.title: Tax withholding reduces LKQ Corp (LKQ) insider reported shares
feed.summary: LKQ Corp's Senior Vice President and General Counsel, Matthew J. McKay, reported a tax-related share withholding, not an open-market trade. On March 2, 2026, 3,099.21 shares of LKQ common stock, valued at $32.50 per share, were withheld by the issuer to cover taxes on vested restricted stock units. Following this transaction, McKay directly holds 130,376.7850 shares of LKQ.

feed.title: PG&E Corp (NYSE: PCG) CEO reports stock grant and tax share disposal
feed.summary: PG&E Corp CEO Sumeet Singh reported receiving a stock grant of 40,817 shares at $0.00 per share as restricted stock units under the company's 2021 Long-Term Incentive Plan. Concurrently, 8,749 shares were disposed of at $19.11 each to cover tax withholding obligations. Following these transactions, Singh directly holds 368,501 shares and indirectly holds approximately 849.39 shares through the PG&E Corporation Retirement Savings Plan.

feed.title: UBS Maintains Buy on The TJX Companies, Inc. (TJX) March 2026
feed.summary: UBS has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating on The TJX Companies, Inc. (TJX) as of March 4, 2026, anticipating that the company will gain market share and deliver strong financial results. This reiteration, without a new price target, led to a modest 0.61% increase in TJX's stock price. Meyka AI independently rates TJX with a B+ grade, factoring in various financial and market performance metrics.

feed.title: Insider Sell Alert: Amanda Rome Sells Shares of Xcel Energy Inc (XEL)
feed.summary: Amanda Rome, Executive Vice President at Xcel Energy Inc, sold 15,969 shares of the company on March 2, 2026. This transaction brings her total holdings to 55,813.097 shares. The stock is currently trading at $83.61, indicating it is significantly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.33.

feed.title: Top Stocks to Double Up on Right Now
feed.summary: This article recommends high-yield dividend stocks Realty Income (NYSE: O) and Federal Realty (NYSE: FRT) as stable investments during uncertain geopolitical times. Both companies are real estate investment trusts (REITs) with long histories of increasing dividends, offering investors reliable income and peace of mind. Realty Income focuses on single-tenant retail properties, while Federal Realty specializes in high-quality strip malls and mixed-use developments.

feed.title: Betting on a new Caesar
feed.summary: The article discusses the speculative betting market on whether Caesars Entertainment Inc. will be acquired before January 1, 2027, highlighting the company's tumultuous history, stock performance, and the challenges of a potential sale given its financial situation and the changing gaming landscape. It traces Caesars' evolution from Harrah's Club in Reno through various mergers and financial difficulties, including a major debt crisis and the recent pandemic.

feed.title: Albemarle Corporation (ALB) Announces New Board Appointments
feed.summary: Albemarle Corporation (ALB) has appointed Michelle T. Collins and Mark R. Widmar as new independent members to its Board of Directors, effective February 26, 2026. These appointments aim to strengthen the company's governance and strategic oversight, with both new directors bringing significant experience. They will receive an annual retainer and restricted stock grants, and their selection is noted to be free of external arrangements or undisclosed transactions.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Gregory Seward Sells 3,000 Shares of Live Oak Banc
feed.summary: Gregory Seward, General Counsel at Live Oak Banking Company, a subsidiary of Live Oak Bancshares Inc (LOB), sold 3,000 shares of the company on March 2, 2026. This transaction reduces his total holdings to 113,797 shares. Live Oak Bancshares Inc is currently considered modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.86, trading at $36.70 against a GF Value of $42.74.

feed.title: S&P Global maintains rating for Cambria County
feed.summary: S&P Global Ratings has maintained Cambria County's BBB+ grade and a negative financial outlook, despite the county seeking a new bond for projects and refinancing. The rating action reflects concerns about the county's slow response to financial challenges and weak risk management. While acknowledging efforts to improve monitoring, S&P Global noted a one-in-three likelihood of a downgrade within the next year if the county fails to adjust expenditures or continues to rely on borrowing.

feed.title: Kratos EVP Lund sells $456k in shares
feed.summary: Deanna H. Lund, EVP and CFO of Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ:KTOS), sold 4,800 shares of common stock for a total of $456,394 on March 2, 2026, through a pre-arranged trading plan. Following these transactions, Lund directly owns 270,058 shares. The article also touches on recent company news, including a significant production contract, an equity share offering, and the deployment of its OpenSpace Platform, contributing to a rise in stock value amidst Middle East tensions.

feed.title: Republic Services brings 9 new RNG projects online in 2025
feed.summary: Republic Services announced that it is bringing nine new Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) projects online in 2025. This initiative highlights the company's commitment to expanding its renewable energy portfolio and contributing to sustainable waste management solutions. These projects are expected to enhance the production of RNG, a key component in decarbonization efforts.

feed.title: Why Is SPY ETF Down Today, 3/4/2026?
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) rose 0.71% on March 4, 2026, driven by investor optimism about de-escalation in Middle East tensions and stable oil markets. This performance closely mirrored the S&P 500 Index, which was up 0.78%, while the Nasdaq-100 rallied 1.51%. Upcoming economic data, earnings reports from major companies like Costco, Marvell, and Kroger, and geopolitical developments are expected to influence SPY's performance this week.

feed.title: News Corp Details US$1bn Buy-Back of Nasdaq-Listed Shares
feed.summary: News Corp has announced a US$1 billion share repurchase program for its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. This buy-back excludes ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests and aims to reduce outstanding shares over time, potentially boosting earnings per share and showing confidence in the company's valuation. The program will be executed flexibly based on market conditions, with the most recent analyst rating on News Corporation (AU:NWS) being a Buy with a A$53.00 price target.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Live Oak Bancshares (NASDAQ:LOB) General Counsel Sells $110,100.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Live Oak Bancshares' General Counsel, Gregory Seward, sold 3,000 shares of LOB stock for $110,100 on March 2nd, reducing his position by 2.57%. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.03 per share, payable on March 15th, representing an annualized yield of 0.3%. LOB currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $44.20.

feed.title: Public Service Enterprise (PEG) SVP sells 4,700 common shares at $83
feed.summary: Richard T. Thigpen, Senior Vice President of Corporate Citizenship at Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG), sold 4,700 common shares at $83 per share on March 3, 2026, as reported in a Form 4 SEC filing. Following this transaction, Thigpen directly owns 28,480.577 common shares of the company. The filing indicates a "Negative" sentiment and a "Moderate" impact due to the insider sale.

feed.title: Baxter International: Spin-Off Nears As Wall Street Re-Rates The Stock
feed.summary: Baxter International is undergoing significant restructuring, including a spin-off of its kidney-care business, which is drawing renewed attention from Wall Street analysts. The company aims to become a more focused, higher-margin medical products entity, but investors are weighing the potential for value creation against execution risks inherent in such a complex separation. The success of this transformation will depend on effective deleveraging, cost management, and the market's reception of the new entities.

feed.title: CSX Recognizes Nine Short Line Partners at Annual Partner Conference
feed.summary: CSX recently honored nine short line railroad partners at its annual Short Line Conference in Jacksonville, Florida. These awards recognize partners who demonstrated strong operational performance, a commitment to safety and service, and support for customer growth, with winners selected based on carload growth metrics. The conference aims to strengthen relationships and enhance service across CSX's extensive network of over 240 short line railroads.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) Director Buys $13,875.30 in Stock
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) Director Moshe Gavrielov recently purchased 54 shares of the company's stock for $13,875.30, increasing his direct stake to 1,130 shares. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $1.99 EPS and $1.44 billion in revenue, and provided optimistic guidance for Q1 and FY 2026. CDNS stock is trading up, with a market capitalization of $83.3 billion, and analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $376.50.

feed.title: Stride Resolves School Dispute As Undervalued Shares Retain Contract Clarity
feed.summary: Stride, Inc. (NYSE:LRN) has successfully resolved a contract dispute with Gallup-McKinley County Schools, leading to the dismissal of all complaints and the renewal of a modified partnership running through June 2026. This agreement, which includes a framework for tutoring services, removes legal uncertainty and provides clarity on Stride's district partnerships. With the company's shares trading significantly below analyst targets and estimated fair value, the resolution could strengthen investor confidence in its institutional relationships and future growth opportunities in digital learning and remediation services.

feed.title: Defiance納斯達克100收益目標主動型ETF-QQQT-ETF相關分析
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Defiance Nasdaq 100 Enhanced Income ETF (QQQT), detailing its correlation with numerous other ETFs and investment products. It lists a wide range of ETFs, their tracking indexes, and their correlation coefficients to QQQT. The data aims to help investors understand how QQQT relates to other growth, technology, and income-focused ETFs in the market.

feed.title: Turning Point Brands Stock Has Surged 53%, but One Fund Just Sold $12.5 Million in Shares
feed.summary: Cannell Capital sold 128,224 shares of Turning Point Brands (TPB) in late 2025, valued at an estimated $12.54 million, despite the stock having surged 53% over the past year. This transaction reduced Cannell Capital's holding to 2.73% of its AUM, potentially reflecting a strategy to lock in gains after a strong rally rather than an abandonment of the company's long-term prospects. Turning Point Brands, a diversified consumer products company in the tobacco and alternative smoking sector, continues to show strong performance with increasing net sales and adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: Amcor Updates CDI and Securities Balances for February 2026
feed.summary: Amcor PLC has released an update on its CDI and securities balances for February 2026. The company reported an increase in ASX-listed CDIs due to net transfers from NYSE-traded ordinary shares, while common shares, options, and share rights outstanding decreased. This activity reflects routine capital management, not a strategic shift, and a recent analyst rating for AU:AMC stock is a Buy with a A$91.25 price target.

feed.title: iShares Russell 1000 ETF (NYSE: IWB) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides the current share price and performance data for the iShares Russell 1000 ETF (NYSE: IWB). The current share price is $373.15, reflecting a -0.94% movement from its closing price seven days prior. The article includes historical data on share price movements over the current year, last year, and financial years, along with detailed daily share price history.

feed.title: Sutro Biopharma (STRO) GC reports new RSUs, options and tax share withholdings
feed.summary: Sutro Biopharma's Chief Administrative Officer and General Counsel, David Pauling, reported several equity transactions including receiving new awards of 4,200 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and stock options for 33,600 shares. The report also detailed the vesting and settlement of previously awarded RSUs. Additionally, some common shares were withheld to cover tax obligations related to RSU settlements, which the company clarified do not represent market sales by Pauling.

feed.title: iShares中期市政收益債券主動型ETF-INMU-ETF基本資料
feed.summary: This article provides basic information about the iShares Intermediate Muni Income Active ETF (INMU). It details the ETF's issuer (iShares/BlackRock), its investment style focusing on tax-exempt municipal bonds, key financial metrics like ETF size and yield, and its strategy to maximize tax-free current income by investing primarily in investment-grade municipal bonds.

feed.title: LS Power entities, David Nanus report shared voting of NRG (NYSE: NRG) stakes
feed.summary: Nine related reporting persons, including LS Power-related entities and David Nanus, jointly filed an amendment to beneficial ownership reporting for NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG). The filing indicates shared voting and dispositive power over 6,371,100 shares (3.00% of class) and 8,120,731 shares (3.82% of class) of NRG common stock. This follows a secondary offering and a company share repurchase on March 4, 2026, where Lightning and other holders sold 14,300,000 shares at $164 per share.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Recognizes Its Safe Drivers
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. recognized its fourth-quarter 2003 one- and two-million mile safe drivers, highlighting their commitment to safety. The company awards cash bonuses of $5,000 for one million safe miles, $10,000 for two million, and $20,000 for three million. CEO Kirk Thompson praised these drivers for setting high safety standards.

feed.title: BK Technologies Announces Technology Innovation Center to Expand into New Addressable Markets Totaling $1.2 Billion
feed.summary: BK Technologies Corporation has announced the establishment of a new Technology Innovation Center in South Florida. The center's initial focus is the completion of the BKR 9000, which, combined with the BKR 5000, is expected to enable the company to enter new vertical markets estimated at $1.2 billion. Led by CTO Dr. Branko Avanic, the center aims to leverage leading-edge communication technologies to address challenges faced by public safety professionals.

feed.title: Tennessee Legislation Puts CVS Pharmacy Model And Valuation In Focus
feed.summary: Proposed legislation in Tennessee could force the closure of over 100 CVS Pharmacy locations, impacting CVS Health's integrated retail and pharmacy benefit manager (PBM) business model. This development introduces a new operational risk for CVS Health, with potential broader implications for vertically integrated pharmacy and PBM models nationwide. Investors are advised to monitor the company's regional earnings exposure and potential legislative trends in other states.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Weighs Permian Sale As Willow And LNG Shift Cash Outlook
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips is considering selling certain Permian Basin assets, valued around US$2 billion, to streamline its portfolio as it shifts focus from heavy project spending to harvesting cash from LNG and the Willow oil project. This move aims to free up capital, potentially boosting shareholder returns and free cash flow, though it may impact future production outlook. Investors should monitor the execution of the Permian sale, updated production guidance, and progress on the Willow and LNG projects, especially given geopolitical influences on oil prices.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Norfolk Southern (NSC) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) has seen significant share price appreciation but appears overvalued according to valuation models. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 52.5% above its intrinsic value of US$208.41, while its P/E ratio of 24.9x is above Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 20.8x, indicating it is expensive relative to its earnings growth profile. Investors are encouraged to use "Narratives" on Simply Wall St to create personalized valuation models.

feed.title: NRG Energy Announces Appointment of Caroline Golin as Chief Growth and Policy Officer
feed.summary: NRG Energy Inc. has appointed Caroline Golin, Ph.D., as its new Chief Growth and Policy Officer. Dr. Golin brings over two decades of experience in energy strategy and market development, and will focus on driving strategic business initiatives to support reliability and affordability, including data center expansion and residential virtual power plant programs. She will also lead NRG’s Government and Regulatory Affairs functions, leveraging her previous experience from Google and Envision Energy Advisors.

feed.title: Wedbush Maintains Outperform on Apple Inc. (AAPL) March 04, 2026
feed.summary: Wedbush reiterated an Outperform rating on Apple Inc. (AAPL) on March 04, 2026, citing that nearly half of recent Mac buyers are new to the platform as a potential upside. Bernstein also maintained an Outperform rating, while UBS kept a Neutral stance. None of the firms issued new price targets, leading to a muted market reaction and reinforcing existing sentiment rather than signaling new catalysts for the stock.

feed.title: NASA Said to Tap Boeing-Lockheed’s Vulcan for Top of Moon Rocket
feed.summary: NASA is reportedly planning to select United Launch Alliance (ULA) to provide a crucial component for future missions of its moon rocket, replacing hardware previously intended from Boeing Co. This decision comes as costs for the component had escalated to $2.8 billion. Boeing, which currently builds the core of NASA's Space Launch System, also has a separate multi-billion-dollar contract for an upgraded version of the rocket.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) VP Paul Cunningham Sells 1,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) VP Paul Cunningham sold 1,000 shares of the company's stock on March 2nd at an average price of $297.78, reducing his position by 1.05%. The sale, totaling $297,780, was disclosed in an SEC filing, with Cunningham now owning 94,137 shares. This follows previous sales by Cunningham in February and January, as the company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations and providing positive guidance for Q1 and FY 2026.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) Director Madhu Ranganathan Sells 3,131 Shares
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies Director Madhu Ranganathan sold 3,131 shares, reducing her stake by over 25%. This insider selling comes alongside other executives' sales, potentially creating near-term selling pressure. Despite this, Akamai beat Q4 earnings expectations and announced plans to deploy NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, strengthening its AI and edge computing strategy.

feed.title: James River Group Holdings, Ltd. (NASDAQ:JRVR) Plans $0.01 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: James River Group Holdings, Ltd. (NASDAQ:JRVR) has declared a $0.01 quarterly dividend, payable on March 31st to shareholders of record by March 13th, representing an annualized dividend of $0.04 and a yield of 0.6%. Despite missing recent quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, the dividend is well-covered by earnings with a payout ratio of 3.5%, and analysts project a future payout ratio of 2.2% based on expected earnings of $1.80 per share next year. The stock traded up 4.0% to $6.94, and it currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $6.80.

feed.title: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.40
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, payable on April 10th to shareholders of record as of March 16th. This annualized dividend of $1.60 represents a 1.1% yield and is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 37.8%. The company has consistently increased its dividend for the past four years and recently exceeded Q1 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) CAO Sells 955 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Alphabet's Chief Accounting Officer, Amie Thuener O'toole, sold 955 shares of GOOG stock on March 3rd for $284,590, reducing her stake by 8.78%. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and declared a $0.21 quarterly dividend. Despite positive AI momentum and analyst upgrades, Alphabet faces risks including a wrongful-death lawsuit related to its Gemini chatbot, Waymo safety probes, and broader macro/geopolitical volatility.

feed.title: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) CAO Sells $284,590.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc.'s Chief Accounting Officer (CAO), Amie Thuener O'Toole, sold 955 shares of GOOGL stock on March 3rd, 2026, for a total of $284,590.00, reducing her ownership by 8.78%. This insider sale comes amidst significant company developments including a settlement with Epic Games regarding Play Store commissions, accelerating AI spending, and ongoing scrutiny over AI governance and Waymo's operations. The article also provides details on Alphabet's financial performance, dividend announcement, and recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: TJX Companies (NYSE:TJX) CEO Sells $4,828,500.00 in Stock
feed.summary: TJX Companies CEO Ernie Herrman sold 30,000 shares of company stock for $4,828,500, reducing his stake by 5.89%. This transaction follows a strong earnings report where TJX beat EPS expectations and saw an 8.5% revenue increase, with analysts maintaining a "Buy" rating and an average price target of $167.55. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.425 per share.

feed.title: Sempra's Vista Pacifico LNG Partnership Terminated
feed.summary: Sempra has cancelled its planned Vista Pacifico LNG project in Mexico due to shifting priorities of both Sempra and its partner. The US LNG developer had been working on the project on Mexico’s West Coast. This termination reflects a change in the strategic focus for the companies involved.

feed.title: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) COO Eugene Noel Sells 41,209 Shares
feed.summary: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) COO Eugene Noel sold 41,209 shares of the company's stock on March 2nd, totaling approximately $7.87 million, which decreased his direct holdings by 58.2%. This sale follows the company's Q4 earnings miss on EPS, though revenue slightly beat estimates, and the company provided FY 2026 EPS guidance. American Tower also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.70, but its dividend payout ratio is noted as high at 126.16%.

feed.title: Jon Miller Sells 11,000 Shares of Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) Stock
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies director Jon Miller sold 11,000 shares of company stock for approximately $1.13 million, reducing his position by 32.5%. This sale, alongside other insider sales, comes even as Akamai announced strong Q4 earnings, positive revenue guidance, and plans to deploy NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs to enhance its AI infrastructure. The article notes both positive sentiment from AI integration and recent earnings beats, balanced by the negative signal from insider selling.

feed.title: William Jacob Savage Sells 7,378 Shares of Disc Medicine (NASDAQ:IRON) Stock
feed.summary: William Jacob Savage, an insider at Disc Medicine (NASDAQ:IRON), sold 7,378 shares of the company's stock on March 2nd at an average price of $65.88, totaling $486,062.64. This transaction reduced his position by 7.97%, and he now holds 85,211 shares valued at over $5.6 million. Following the news, Disc Medicine's stock traded down 5.1% to $61.10, although analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $104.80 despite recent reductions in price objectives from several firms.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) CEO Sells $2,657,941.80 in Stock
feed.summary: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) CEO James Matthew Darden sold 18,318 shares of the company's stock for $2,657,941.80, reducing his ownership by 26.39%. This transaction follows a previous sale of 9,527 shares in late February. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend from $0.27 to $0.33 and provided FY2026 EPS guidance, despite slightly missing Q4 2025 earnings and revenue estimates.
